description: Rise of Avalon Patch 8 - Hotfix 1 (31 October 2020) — Fixes.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: [MOBILE] Fixed an issue where the final chest was not appearing in Hallowed Ground (Allhallows Dungeon) for mobile users
sections.searchable_text: Fixes MOBILE final chest not appearing Hallowed Ground Allhallows Dungeon mobile users
